title: App
content:
# App


## Properties

- **name** (`string`): The name of the application. This is the unique identifier for the application.
- **title** (`string`): Human-readable name of the application.
- **description** (`string`): Human-readable description of the application.
- **category** (`string`): The category of the application.
- **type** (`string`): The type of application.

- `app`: An App that allows mapping inputs and outputs to data
streams, sending control changes, recommendations, and data tags.
- `importer`: Connects to an external system to import data into the
platform as well as receive control changes to act on the external
system.
- `exporter`: Connects to the platform to export data to an external
system.
- `docker`: An external application that does not connect to the
platform's data streams.
- `task`: An application type used internally by the Tasks feature.
- **dashboard_uid** (`string`): 
- **latest_version** (`string`): The version of the Application that was crated last
- **versions** (`array`): 
- **deployment** (`object`): 
- **created_at** (`string`): UTC time when the object was created, formatted in RFC 3339.
- **created_by** (`string`): KRN of the user or process that created the object.
- **updated_at** (`string`): UTC time when any keys were last updated, formatted in RFC 3339.
- **updated_by** (`string`): KRN of the user or process that last updated any of the keys.
summary: Object with properties: name, title, description, category, type
